patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Realm Divided Update
description: Realm Divided Update Combat Balance Changes (24 November 2025) — Arcane Staffs, Axes, Bows, Crossbows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Maces, Quarterstaffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, Swords, Helmets, Armors, Shoes, Capes, Mounts, Knightfall Abbey, Resilience Penetration (all melee weapons), Resilience, Miscellaneous.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Starfall Astral Staff Resilience Penetration Axes Relentless Assault Crystal Reaper Whirlwind Greataxe Bows Demon Arrow Wailing Bow mobs Raging Storm Bow of Badon Damage per tick Crossbows Vicious Barrage Siegebow defense while channeling Cursed Staffs Cursed Beam Daggers Chain Slash Maces Eye of the Storm Dreadstorm Monarch Ground Shaker Guard Rune Quarterstaffs Cartwheel Resistance Whirling Strikes Shapeshifter Staffs Airborne Lightcaller Spears Cripple Swords Charge Claymore Hamstring Heroic Strike Limitbreaker Infinity Blade Splitting Slash Helmets Block Soldier Helmet Hush Demon Helmet Ice Block Cleric Cowl Armors Dynamic Defense Jacket of Tenacity Mist Cloud Mistwalker Jacket Shoes Frost Walk Druid Sandals Hover Sandals of Purity Swift Cut Assassin Shoes Capes Shield of Protection Martlock Cape Mounts Faction Mounts Saddled Wild Boar Saddled Swamp Salamander Knightfall Abbey Blessing of Compassion Resilience Penetration all melee weapons Resilience

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Starfall Astral Staff Resilience Penetration while channeling 30% 20%

changes.raw_text: Starfall: Resilience Penetration while channeling: 30% → 20%

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Relentless Assault Crystal Reaper Dash end stand time 0.3s 0.25s Damage to mobs 105 95 Whirlwind Greataxe Added 20% bonus move speed 0.75s on hit

changes.raw_text: Relentless Assault: Dash end stand time: 0.3s → 0.25s; Damage to mobs: 105 → 95
Whirlwind: Added 20% bonus move speed for 0.75s on hit
notes: Added: 20% bonus move speed for 0.75s on hit (only while actively hitting enemies)

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Demon Arrow Wailing Bow Always deals 391 damage to mobs Raging Storm Bow of Badon Damage per tick 24.20 23

changes.raw_text: Demon Arrow: Now always deals 391 damage to mobs
notes: Now always deals 391 damage to mobs (hitting mobs still escalates player damage values)

changes.raw_text: Raging Storm: Damage per tick: 24.20 → 23

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Vicious Barrage Siegebow Added 33.333% defense vs players while channeling vs mobs

changes.raw_text: Vicious Barrage: Added 33.333% defense vs players while channeling; Added 33.333% defense vs mobs while channeling
notes: Added: 33.333% defense vs players while channeling
Added: 33.333% defense vs mobs while channeling

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Cursed Beam Damage per tick 1+ stacks 68 72

changes.raw_text: Cursed Beam: Damage per tick with 1+ stacks: 68 → 72

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Chain Slash 2nd target damage 125 140 3rd target 140 200 Removed 4th chain hit

changes.raw_text: Chain Slash: 2nd target damage: 125 → 140; 3rd target damage: 140 → 200; Removed 4th chain hit.

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Eye of the Storm Dreadstorm Monarch Stand time per cast reduced 0.1s Hit delay 0.3s 0.25s Ground Shaker Knock-up 0.6s 0.4s Damage 200 219 Guard Rune Resistance increase 0.225 0.2

changes.raw_text: Eye of the Storm: Stand time per cast reduced by 0.1s; Hit delay: 0.3s → 0.25s
notes: Stand time per cast reduced by 0.1s

changes.raw_text: Ground Shaker: Knock-up duration: 0.6s → 0.4s; Damage: 200 → 219
Guard Rune: Resistance increase: 0.225 → 0.2

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Cartwheel Resistance increase 0.1 0.2 Whirling Strikes Damage per tick 38 40 Cooldown 4s 3s Removed cooldown refund stacks

changes.raw_text: Cartwheel: Resistance increase: 0.1 → 0.2
Whirling Strikes: Damage per tick: 38 → 40; Cooldown: 4s → 3s; Removed cooldown refund based on stacks.
notes: Removed cooldown refund based on stacks

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Airborne Lightcaller Movespeed bonus removed when transforming back human form

changes.raw_text: Airborne: Movespeed bonus is now removed when transforming back to human form
notes: Movespeed bonus is now removed when transforming back to human form

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Cripple Changed debuff attack speed reduction decrease all damage

changes.raw_text: Cripple: Changed debuff type: attack speed reduction → decrease all damage
notes: Debuff changed: attack speed reduction → decrease all damage

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Charge Claymore Cast range 11m 13m Dash end stand time 0.8s 0.5s Hamstring 1st cast damage 78 86 1st cast cooldown 8s 6s 2nd cast max dash range 7m 8m 2nd cast cooldown 8s 10s no Heroic Charge Heroic Strike Movespeed buff duration 3s 3.5s Limitbreaker Infinity Blade Channel can be interrupted Splitting Slash Root duration 1s 1.25s

changes.raw_text: Charge: Cast range: 11m → 13m; Dash end stand time: 0.8s → 0.5s
Hamstring: 1st cast damage: 78 → 86; 1st cast cooldown: 8s → 6s; 2nd cast max dash range: 7m → 8m; 2nd cast cooldown: 8s → 10s; 2nd cast no longer requires or consumes a Heroic Charge.
notes: 2nd cast no longer requires or consumes a Heroic Charge

changes.raw_text: Heroic Strike: Movespeed buff duration: 3s → 3.5s
Limitbreaker: Channel can now be interrupted
notes: Channel can now be interrupted (Limitbreaker still available if interrupted)

changes.raw_text: Splitting Slash: Root duration: 1s → 1.25s

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Block Soldier Helmet Cooldown 30s 40s Hush Demon Helmet ground-targeted spell Range 11m Radius 4m Hit delay 1s 0.45s Silence duration 4.86s 3.3s Cooldown 40s 30s Ice Block Cleric Cowl Cannot receive healing while channeling

changes.raw_text: Block: Cooldown: 30s → 40s
Hush: Is now a ground-targeted spell. Range: auto-attack based → 11m; Radius: 4m; Hit delay: 1s → 0.45s; Silence duration: 4.86s → 3.3s; Cooldown: 40s → 30s.
Ice Block: Cannot receive healing while channeling

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Dynamic Defense Jacket of Tenacity Resistance increase 0.5 0.8 Mist Cloud Mistwalker Jacket Self-slow strength 20% 30%

changes.raw_text: Dynamic Defense: Resistance increase: 0.5 → 0.8
Mist Cloud: Self-slow strength: 20% → 30%

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Frost Walk Druid Sandals Always slows full value inside area removed when leaving Hover Sandals of Purity Movement speed 60% 50% Swift Cut Assassin Shoes Interrupting dash prevents damage

changes.raw_text: Frost Walk: Always slows for full value while in the area. Slow is removed when leaving the area.
notes: Always slows for full value while in the area
Slow is removed when leaving the area (no longer interacts with slow DR)

changes.raw_text: Hover: Movement speed: 60% → 50%
Swift Cut: Interrupting the dash now prevents damage
notes: Interrupting the dash now prevents damage

subsections.heading: Capes
subsections.searchable_text: Capes Shield of Protection Martlock Cape Defense buff no longer purgeable Base cooldown 225s 245s Cooldown reduction per 100 IP 5s 8s 700IP 190s 189s 1600IP 145s 117s

changes.raw_text: Shield of Protection: Defense buff is no longer purgeable. Base cooldown: 225s → 245s; Cooldown reduction per 100 IP: 5s → 8s (700 IP: 190s→189s; 1600 IP: 145s→117s).
notes: Defense buff is no longer purgeable

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Faction Mounts Zig Elite Terrorbird galloping Winter Call Elite Winter Bear stun instead of root Fearless Rush Elite Wild Boar Range 16m 12m Highland Resilience Elite Bighorn Ram defense vs mobs players 33.333% Shed Skin Elite Swamp Salamander Cooldown 30s 20s CC immunity 2s 3s Saddled Wild Boar Elite Wild Boar Base move speed 60% 55% Saddled Swamp Salamander Carry weight 195kg 391kg Elite 396kg 791kg

changes.raw_text: Zig: Now starts galloping after use
Winter Call: Now stuns after five Winter Lord Charges, instead of rooting
notes: Now stuns after five Winter Lord Charges, instead of rooting

changes.raw_text: Fearless Rush: Range: 16m → 12m
Highland Resilience: Defense vs mobs: 5.66% → 33.333%; Defense vs players: 10.714% → 33.333%
Shed Skin: Cooldown: 30s → 20s; Crowd control immunity duration: 2s → 3s

changes.ability: Saddled Wild Boar / Elite Wild Boar:
changes.raw_text: Wild Boar: Base move speed: 60% → 55%

changes.ability: Saddled Swamp Salamander / Elite Swamp Salamander:
changes.raw_text: Saddled Swamp Salamander: Carry weight: 195kg → 391kg; Elite Swamp Salamander: Carry weight: 396kg → 791kg

subsections.heading: Knightfall Abbey
subsections.searchable_text: Knightfall Abbey Blessing of Compassion 4% less health 1 stack 10% 5% 15 stacks 24% 19%

changes.raw_text: Blessing of Compassion: 4% less health recovered instantly at all stack counts. 1 stack: 10% → 5% (total heal: 15% → 10%). 15 stacks: 24% → 19% (total heal: 32.5% → 27.5%).

subsections.heading: Resilience Penetration — All Melee Weapons
subsections.searchable_text: Resilience Penetration all melee weapons reduced 10% Battle Bracers 15% Broadsword Claymore Dual Swords Clarent Blade Carving Sword Galatine Pair Kingmaker Infinity Blade Battleaxe Greataxe Halberd Carrioncaller Infernal Scythe Bear Paws Realmbreaker Crystal Reaper Mace Heavy Mace Morning Star Bedrock Mace Incubus Mace Camlann Mace Oathkeepers Dreadstorm Monarch Hammer Polehammer Great Hammer Tombhammer Forge Hammers Grovekeeper Hand of Justice Truebolt Hammer Brawler Gloves Battle Bracers Spiked Gauntlets Ursine Maulers Hellfire Hands Ravenstrike Cestus Fists of Avalon Forcepulse Bracers Spear Pike Glaive Heron Spear Spirithunter Trinity Spear Daybreaker Rift Glaive Dagger Dagger Pair Claws Bloodletter Demonfang Deathgivers Bridled Fury Twin Slayers Quarterstaff Iron-Clad Staff Double Bladed Staff Black Monk Stave Soulscythe Staff of Balance Grailseeker Phantom Twinblade Shadow Panther Spirit Bear Werewolf Runestone Golem Crystal Cobra

changes.raw_text: All melee weapons had their Resilience Penetration reduced by 10% (Battle Bracers by 15%). Exceptions listed by weapon. See full patch notes for detailed table.
notes: Clarent Blade: 15% → 5%; Carving Sword: 35% → 25%; Galatine Pair: 30% → 20%
Brawler Gloves: 35% → 25%; Battle Bracers: 35% → 20%; Spiked Gauntlets: 20% → 10%
Ravenstrike Cestus: 30% → 20%; Fists of Avalon: 30% → 20%; Forcepulse Bracers: 30% → 20%

subsections.heading: Resilience
subsections.searchable_text: Resilience unmounted players lower 5 attackers ranged weapons more damage melee less Maximum Resilience 80% 25+ 75% 26+ attackers

changes.raw_text: Players (unmounted) now experience slightly lower Resilience starting from 5 or more attackers. Maximum Resilience value for players (unmounted) reduced from 80% at 25+ attackers to 75% at 26+ attackers.
notes: Slightly lower Resilience starting from 5+ attackers (benefits ranged weapons, partially offsets melee RP reductions)
Against 7 attackers' worth of Resilience: ranged weapons deal 6.4% more damage, melee (on average) 4.6% less
Against 12 attackers' worth: ranged 18.8% more, melee 2.8% less

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous Slowing Charge Hammers no longer interrupts movement input

changes.raw_text: Slowing Charge: No longer interrupts movement input
